title: Give an error if a localparam is modified at instantiation
body:
iverilog seems to treat localparam just like parameter, which makes its purpose of having a private parameter useless.

Incisive complains and exists an error as expected.

module.v:

```
module mymodule;
localparam ABC = 2
...
```

module_tb.v:

```
module mymodule_tb;
mymodule #( .ABC(123) ) top;
...
```
